exposes.note: { stateMachine, ui, rulesEngine, strategyTable } — used by the test harness to drive the integrated artifact

notes: index.html includes <script type="module" src="app.js"></script>. app.js imports all modules as ES modules with relative paths. boot() builds the state machine via factory, calls mountUI(root, stateMachine), then wireHintAndReview. window.__bj is exposed so tests.html can drive real user flows.

self_test_results.S6_A1_no_build_step: All script tags use relative paths to .js files; type=module; no bundler required
self_test_results.S6_A2_six_surfaces: DOM after mountUI contains all six required surfaces — pass
self_test_results.S6_A3_module_wiring: Click flow: btn-deal -> stateMachine.dispatch({type:'deal'}) -> render fires via subscribe; btn-hint -> hint-and-review handler -> renderHint helper — pass
